title: Ean - 單兵作戰：以領域驅動設計 (DDD) 改善既有進銷存管理系統的策略與實踐
titleEn: Ean — Solo Combat: Improving a Legacy Inventory System with DDD
highlight: 一人團隊在無法改動的舊資料庫限制下，改造真實進銷存系統。
highlightEn: A one-person team modernizing a real inventory system under an unchangeable legacy database.

title: 張安邦 Andrew - 保險×DDD×中台×微服務-國泰產險BeSafe平台經驗分享
titleEn: Andrew Chang — Insurance × DDD × Platform × Microservices: Cathay Insurance's BeSafe Platform
highlight: 國泰產險 BeSafe 平台的具名企業案例：保險 × 中台 × 微服務。
highlightEn: A named enterprise case: Cathay Insurance's BeSafe platform — insurance × platform × microservices.

title: DDD TW 4th Meetup - 我的 LinkedIn 三年開發遊歷, By Ian Tsai
titleEn: Ian Tsai — Three Years of Development at LinkedIn
highlight: LinkedIn 內部系統的第一手經驗，誠實點出「這其實是 Distributed Monolith」。
highlightEn: First-hand experience inside LinkedIn's systems — honestly naming a Distributed Monolith when he saw one.

title: Chris Simon - When Customers Don't Share a Language
titleEn: Chris Simon — When Customers Don't Share a Language
highlight: 2015 年澳洲金融/保險業真實案例，示範 Context Mapping 如何隨客戶關係演進。
highlightEn: A real 2015 Australian fintech/insurance case showing how context maps evolve with customer relationships.

title: 水球潘 - 新創到底適不適合走 DDD ？ 就讓我公司當白老鼠走一次 Scrum x DDD 試試看吧
titleEn: Waterball Pan — Does DDD Even Fit a Startup? Using My Own Company as the Guinea Pig
highlight: 拿自己的新創公司當白老鼠，實測 DDD 到底適不適合早期團隊。
highlightEn: Using his own startup as the guinea pig to test whether DDD actually fits an early-stage team.

title: [2020 DDDTW 年會] DDD + Clean Architecture 從需求到實作 - Teddy 陳建村
titleEn: Teddy Chen — DDD + Clean Architecture, from Requirements to Implementation
highlight: 從需求訪談、Event Storming 到 Clean Architecture 落地程式碼的完整流程，以 ezKanban 為例。
highlightEn: The full pipeline from requirements to code — Event Storming through Clean Architecture — using the real ezKanban system.

title: 劉宥辰 - 從混亂到組織：DDD 與 Clean Architecture 的持續精進挑戰之道
titleEn: Liu You-Chen — From Chaos to Order: The Ongoing Challenge of DDD and Clean Architecture
highlight: 在真實工作中遇到的 code smell，一步步走向 Clean Architecture 的重構過程。
highlightEn: Real code smells encountered at work, and the step-by-step refactor toward Clean Architecture.

title: Vlad Khononov - Balancing Coupling in Software Design
titleEn: Vlad Khononov — Balancing Coupling in Software Design
highlight: 《Balancing Coupling in Software Design》作者親自講解耦合模型。
highlightEn: The coupling model explained by the author of the book on the subject.

title: [DDDesign Taiwan 2021 Conference] Julie Lerman - 一窺堂奧 - 領域驅動設計：是基於臨場務實還是有原則可參考?
titleEn: Julie Lerman — Domain-Driven Design: Pragmatism or Principle?
highlight: 國際知名 DDD 作者與 Pluralsight 講師，談 DDD 是務實還是原則。
highlightEn: An internationally recognized DDD author and Pluralsight instructor on pragmatism vs. principle in DDD.

title: 持續演進的架構 — 擁抱多元利害關係人視角（高翊凱 Kim Kao，2021 年會）
titleEn: Continuous Architecture — Embracing Multiple Stakeholder Viewpoints (Kim Kao, 2021 Conference)
highlight: 從單一利害關係人視角出發，談架構如何隨組織多元觀點持續演進。
highlightEn: How architecture keeps evolving once you account for multiple stakeholder viewpoints.

title: AWS re:Invent 2023 — Implementing Distributed Design Patterns on AWS（BOA309，Kim Kao 等）
titleEn: AWS re:Invent 2023 — Implementing Distributed Design Patterns on AWS (BOA309, feat. Kim Kao)
highlight: AWS 官方研討會場次，實作分散式設計模式的雲端落地案例。
highlightEn: An official AWS re:Invent session implementing distributed design patterns on the cloud.

title: DDDTW 2020 Conference 專人訪談 - 王威 (ThoughtWorks中國區諮詢團隊數位技術戰略諮詢師和首席企業架構師)
titleEn: Interview — Wang Wei (ThoughtWorks China Chief Enterprise Architect)
highlight: ThoughtWorks 中國區首席企業架構師，把 Bounded Context 用「一人多角色」的比喻講得最清楚的一次。
highlightEn: ThoughtWorks China's chief enterprise architect explains Bounded Context through a vivid personal-role analogy.

title: DDDTW 2020 Conference 專人訪談 - 張逸 (民航 (成都) 信息技術有限公司 技術總監)
titleEn: Interview — Zhang Yi (Technical Director, Civil Aviation Chengdu Information Technology)
highlight: 十年 DDD 實踐者難得的反思：DDD 不是銀彈，也有它的極限。
highlightEn: A rare reflective take from a 10-year DDD practitioner: DDD is not a silver bullet.

title: They Knew the Answer Before They Understood the Problem — Virtual DDD 訪談 Kim Kao
titleEn: They Knew the Answer Before They Understood the Problem — Virtual DDD interview with Kim Kao
highlight: Virtual DDD 社群訪談 Kim Kao，談「在理解問題前就先有答案」的常見陷阱。
highlightEn: A Virtual DDD community interview on the trap of having answers before understanding the problem.

title: 【DDDesign Taiwan 2021.09 Meetup】DDD 的价值与不足
titleEn: The Value and Limits of DDD
highlight: 少見的批判視角場次：三位講者一起談 DDD 的價值，也不迴避它的不足。
highlightEn: A rare critical session — three speakers discuss DDD's value without dodging its shortcomings.

title: Fong - 你真的懂 SOLID 原則嗎？
titleEn: Fong — Do You Really Understand the SOLID Principles?
highlight: 把 SOLID 原則跟 DDD 戰術設計直接連起來講。
highlightEn: Directly connects the SOLID principles to DDD's tactical design.

title: 程章尧 - DDD Applied: Introducing TDD while breaking down legacy monolith
titleEn: Cheng Zhang-Yao — DDD Applied: Introducing TDD While Breaking Down a Legacy Monolith
highlight: 用 Strangler Fig、測試金字塔、契約測試，一步步為遺留單體導入 TDD。
highlightEn: Introducing TDD into a legacy monolith step by step, using Strangler Fig, the test pyramid, and contract testing.

title: 微服務、限界上下文拆分指導原則 by Kim Kao - 2020 June Meetup Part 2
titleEn: Guiding Principles for Splitting Microservices and Bounded Contexts (Kim Kao, 2020 June Meetup Part 2)
highlight: 以真實的行銷活動系統為例，講三種限界上下文拆分策略。
highlightEn: Three concrete strategies for splitting bounded contexts, illustrated with a real marketing-campaign system.
